constructors.name: Point3D(point: Point2D)
constructors.summary: Explicit copy constructor. Copy only X_COORD and Y_COORD from point, Z_COORD is set to zero.
constructors.remarks: Explicit copy constructor. Copy only X_COORD and Y_COORD from point, Z_COORD is set to zero.

params.name: point
params.doc: 2D Point which will be copied to the 3D point.

constructors.name: Point3D(refPoint: Point3D, point: Point3D)
constructors.summary: Constructor. Initialize point from point in local coordinate system. Formula: Result = refPoint + point
constructors.remarks: Constructor. Initialize point from point in local coordinate system. Formula: Result = refPoint + point

constructors.name: Point3D(x: float, y: float, z: float)
constructors.signature: Point3D(x: float, y: float, z: float)
constructors.summary: Constructor Initialize point from single coordinates in world coordinate system.
constructors.remarks: Constructor Initialize point from single coordinates in world coordinate system.

methods.name: GetCoords
methods.summary: Get copy of X,Y,Z coordinates
methods.remarks: Get copy of X,Y,Z coordinates

returns.doc: tuple(X coordinate of point, Y coordinate of point, Z coordinate of point)

methods.name: GetDistance
methods.summary: Get distance Formula: Result(double) = |A-B|.
methods.remarks: Get distance Formula: Result(double) = |A-B|.

methods.name: IsZero
methods.summary: Check the coords [0.0, 0.0, 0.0] If the coords are zero, the return value is true. If the coords aren't zero, the return value is false.
methods.remarks: Check the coords [0.0, 0.0, 0.0] If the coords are zero, the return value is true. If the coords aren't zero, the return value is false.

methods.name: Set(point: Point3D)
methods.summary: Initialize from point 3D.
methods.remarks: Initialize from point 3D.

methods.name: Set(x: float, y: float, z: float)
methods.signature: Set(x: float, y: float, z: float)
methods.summary: Initialize from x,y,z coordinates.
methods.remarks: Initialize from x,y,z coordinates.

methods.name: Values
methods.summary: Get copy of X,Y,Z coordinates as python list
methods.remarks: Get copy of X,Y,Z coordinates as python list

methods.name: __add__(vec: Vector3D) -> Point3D
methods.summary: Move the point by vector 3D
methods.remarks: Move the point by vector 3D

methods.name: __add__(vec: Vector2D) -> Point3D
methods.summary: Move the point by vector 2D. Z axis will be ignored
methods.remarks: Move the point by vector 2D. Z axis will be ignored

methods.name: __add__(point: Point3D) -> Point3D
methods.summary: Point translation by point Formula: Point(new) = Point(this) + Point This is not standard math operation and is implemented only as practical use case for point moving in %Allplan. In this case given operand point represent offset from Zero point. For standard move operation please use Service::Move method with Vector3D operand.
methods.remarks: Point translation by point Formula: Point(new) = Point(this) + Point This is not standard math operation and is implemented only as practical use case for point moving in %Allplan. In this case given operand point represent offset from Zero point. For standard move operation please use Service::Move method with Vector3D operand.

methods.name: __eq__
methods.summary: Comparison of points without tolerance. Be careful, this method work without tolerance!
methods.remarks: Comparison of points without tolerance. Be careful, this method work without tolerance!

returns.doc: True when points are equal, otherwise false.

methods.name: __iadd__
methods.summary: Point translation by point Formula: Point(this) = Point(this) + Point This is not standard math operation and is implemented only as practical use case for point moving in %Allplan. In this case given operand point represent offset from Zero point. For standard move operation please use Service::Move method with Vector3D operand.
methods.remarks: Point translation by point Formula: Point(this) = Point(this) + Point This is not standard math operation and is implemented only as practical use case for point moving in %Allplan. In this case given operand point represent offset from Zero point. For standard move operation please use Service::Move method with Vector3D operand.

methods.name: __idiv__
methods.summary: Divide operator. This method is checked and throwing Geometry::Exception when divider is zero.
methods.remarks: Divide operator. This method is checked and throwing Geometry::Exception when divider is zero.

methods.name: __isub__
methods.summary: Point translation by negative point Formula: Point(this) = Point(this) - Point This is not standard math operation and is implemented only as practical use case for point moving in %Allplan. In this case given operand point represent offset from Zero point. For standard move operation please use Service::Move method with Vector3D operand.
methods.remarks: Point translation by negative point Formula: Point(this) = Point(this) - Point This is not standard math operation and is implemented only as practical use case for point moving in %Allplan. In this case given operand point represent offset from Zero point. For standard move operation please use Service::Move method with Vector3D operand.

methods.name: __mul__(matrix: Matrix2D) -> Point3D
methods.summary: 2D matrix transformation. Result = Point * matrix
methods.remarks: 2D matrix transformation. Result = Point * matrix

methods.name: __mul__(matrix: Matrix3D) -> Point3D
methods.summary: 3D matrix transformation. Result = Point * matrix
methods.remarks: 3D matrix transformation. Result = Point * matrix

methods.name: __mul__(scale: float) -> Point3D
methods.summary: Scale point with constant Result = Point * scale
methods.remarks: Scale point with constant Result = Point * scale

methods.name: __ne__
methods.summary: Comparison of points without tolerance. Be careful, this method work without tolerance!
methods.remarks: Comparison of points without tolerance. Be careful, this method work without tolerance!

returns.doc: True when points are not equal, otherwise false.

methods.summary: Convert to string
methods.remarks: Convert to string

methods.name: __sub__(vec: Vector3D) -> Point3D
methods.summary: Move the point by reversed vector 3D
methods.remarks: Move the point by reversed vector 3D

methods.name: __sub__(vec: Vector2D) -> Point3D
methods.summary: Move the point by reversed vector 2D. Z coordinate stays unchanged.
methods.remarks: Move the point by reversed vector 2D. Z coordinate stays unchanged.

methods.name: __sub__(point: Point3D) -> Point3D
methods.summary: Point translation by negative point Formula: Point(new) = Point(this) - Point This is not standard math operation and is implemented only as practical use case for point moving in %Allplan. In this case given operand point represent offset from Zero point. For standard move operation please use Service::Move method with Vector3D operand.
methods.remarks: Point translation by negative point Formula: Point(new) = Point(this) - Point This is not standard math operation and is implemented only as practical use case for point moving in %Allplan. In this case given operand point represent offset from Zero point. For standard move operation please use Service::Move method with Vector3D operand.
